characters.appearance: Young male, pale complexion, dark messy hair. Distressed facial features.
Light-skinned human hand, visible from the wrist up. Index finger extended.
Male, pale complexion, prominent heavy brow, flat squared-off head, visible scars on forehead.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: English में presentation? मैंने हाँ क्यों कह दिया? [Presentation in English? Why did I say yes?] सब गड़बड़ हो गया। [Everything got messed up.] अब आगे क्या होगा, मुझे बहुत डर लग रहा है। [I am very scared of what will happen now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by showing intense fear and regret, mirroring the original Frankenstein clip.
- Reframes the 'monster' of the scene into the relatable fear of speaking English in a high-pressure situation (like a presentation).
- Sets up the core problem that Supernova's target audience faces: hesitation and lack of confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SUPERNOVA के साथ रोज़ 10 मिनट में ENGLISH बोलना सीखें [LEARN TO SPEAK ENGLISH IN 10 MINUTES A DAY WITH SUPERNOVA]
"English में presentation? मैंने हाँ क्यों कह दिया? सब गड़बड़ हो गया। अब आगे क्या होगा, मुझे बहुत डर लग रहा है।" ["Presentation in English? Why did I say yes? Everything got messed up. I am very scared of what will happen now."]

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: घबराओ मत। Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करो। [Don't panic. Practice daily with Supernova.]
Unknown speaker says: Practice
Unknown speaker says: AI tutor के साथ real-world situations की तैयारी करो। [Prepare for real-world situations with the AI tutor.]
Unknown speaker says: Prepare
Unknown speaker says: बिना किसी डर के, पूरे confidence के साथ बोलो। [Speak without any fear, with full confidence.]
Unknown speaker says: Confidence
Unknown speaker says: आज ही अपनी झिझक दूर करो। [Overcome your hesitation today.]
Unknown speaker says: Overcome
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the supportive, practical solution to the fear established in Scene 1.
- Matches the original beat of tapping words to learn, but changes the context from reading a classic novel to practicing real-world vocabulary.
- Highlights key Supernova features: AI tutor, daily practice, and building speaking confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SUPERNOVA के साथ रोज़ 10 मिनट में ENGLISH बोलना सीखें [LEARN TO SPEAK ENGLISH IN 10 MINUTES A DAY WITH SUPERNOVA]
घबराओ मत। Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करो। AI tutor के साथ real-world situations की तैयारी करो। बिना किसी डर के, पूरे confidence के साथ बोलो। आज ही अपनी झिझक दूर करो।
practice
prepare
confidence
overcome
मुझे पता है [I know]
सीखें [Learn]
